headline: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Stock Trades Down, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of enterprise technology company Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE:HPE) fell 2.9% in the afternoon session as investors reacted to a cocktail of negative macroeconomic news, including surging oil prices and rising Treasury yields.

headline: Why Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Is Up 6.9% After Reshaping Its Global Distribution Model
summary: In May 2026, Ingram Micro announced it had been appointed one of two global distributors for Hewlett Packard Enterprise, gaining full access to HPE’s networking, cloud, and AI portfolio and expanding its HPE Partner Growth Accelerator Program worldwide through the Xvantage digital platform. By consolidating distribution around Ingram Micro and TD SYNNEX while rolling out new GreenLake, private cloud, networking, and high-memory server offerings, HPE is tightening alignment between its...

headline: Dell Price Prediction: Where Will The Tech Stock Be In 2030?
summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) has gone from a value name to an AI infrastructure powerhouse, and our proprietary model still sees more room to run. The 24/7 Wall St. price target for Dell is $275.20 over the next 12 months, implying upside of 15.61% from the current $238.03. The recommendation is buy, with a high confidence ... headline: Can SMCI Navigate CapEx & Inventory Headwinds Amid Rapid Scale-Up?
summary: Super Micro Computer ramps up AI infrastructure capacity to 6,000 racks monthly by FY26 as inventory and cash flow pressures intensify.

headline: Assessing Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Valuation After Its Recent Share Price Surge
summary: Why Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) stock is drawing attention now Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) stock has been drawing attention after a period of strong recent returns, with the share price up around 25% over the past month and about 50% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Hewlett Packard Enterprise. HPE's recent share price momentum, with a 24.8% 30 day share price return and a 36.5% year to date share price return, sits alongside a 93.8% 1 year total shareholder return...
